text: Shala, you don't need another therapist.
Forget I'm your wife. Tell me what your
problems are. I'm going to solve them
for you right now.
>> I think that, you know, my wife spends
too much money and it's become a lot
worse since I let her work and she's
been earning her own money. At least
before that, I could control her.
>> I'm not really seeing a problem here so
far.
>> No, but like the extravagance is out of
control. Like when she can take an Uber
regular, she will order like an Uber X.
shoes and all kinds of things that keep
she keeps buying. You could use it to
for example buy a gift from my mom
sometimes or sometimes she could invite
them over
using business class ticket.
>> The facts are that your wife works,
earns money, supports the family and
occasionally once in a year might buy
herself new shoes.
>> That doesn't seem so problematic to me.
In your mind there is a problem. They
expect that whatever money she makes now
should go to them. No, they are very
considerate people and they don't have
those kind of needs at this age anymore.
>> Well, then why do they need a business
class ticket?
>> Oh, because it's really hard on their
old age bones to be traveling in economy
at this age.
>> You know what? I have the solution for
this. We're going to get you a prograde
Zoom account so you can zoom all day
long. Then no one has to travel
anywhere. It's the easiest on their
bones and their old age.
